CREATE TABLE math_constants (id UInt32, value Float64);
SELECT id, value * 2 AS double_pi FROM math_constants;
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT pi() AS pi_value) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE complex_math (a Float64, b Float64);
SELECT a, b, a + b AS sum FROM complex_math;
SELECT (SELECT pi() FROM complex_math) * 2 AS twice_pi;
CREATE TABLE different_operations (x Float64, y Float64);
SELECT x, y, exp(x) AS exp_pi FROM different_operations WHERE y = 3;
WITH (SELECT pi()) AS constant_pi SELECT constant_pi + 2;
SELECT (SELECT value FROM nested_subquery) * 2 AS derived_value;
SELECT pi() + (SELECT sum(value) FROM nested_subquery) FROM nested_subquery;
